data.description: Enforce that lease binding is only established during claim. For any non-claim command, if a caller supplies a lease_id and the knot does not already have that exact lease bound, the command must fail instead of attaching or switching the lease. In particular, new --lease and update --lease must not create or apply lease bindings; lease assignment must happen only when the knot is claimed. If a knot is claimed without a lease, no later update, next, or other non-claim command may set one until a future claim operation binds it.
